tools.name: mcp__workspace-mcp__get_spreadsheet_info
tools.notes: Use for spreadsheet metadata, sheets, ranges, field masks, and protected range review.

tools.name: mcp__workspace-mcp__read_sheet_values
tools.notes: Use for reading A1 ranges and preserving read-only-first discovery.

tools.name: mcp__workspace-mcp__create_spreadsheet
tools.notes: Use only after confirmation when creating a new spreadsheet resource.

tools.name: mcp__workspace-mcp__modify_sheet_values
tools.notes: Use for value writes and appends after read-only-first discovery and confirmation.

tools.name: mcp__workspace-mcp__format_sheet_range
tools.notes: Use for structural requests such as formatting, protected ranges, dimensions, and data validation.

mcp_tools_spec_requirements.inputSchema: Valid JSON Schema object for expected parameters.
mcp_tools_spec_requirements.outputSchema: Optional schema for structured results when provided.
